sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Blest be God the Father, and the Only Begotten Son of God, and also the Holy Spirit, for he has shown us his merciful love.

sections.author: SP2025
sections.snippet: O Lord, our God, how wonderful your name in all the earth.

sections.author: SP2025
sections.snippet: Glory to the Father, the Son, and the Holy Spirit; to God who is, who was, and who is to come.

sections.title: God, My Father
sections.author: Jackie François
sections.snippet: Help me to trust you, help me depend on you alone, help me to love you and have faith like a child. My hands are lifted high.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Since you are children of God, God has sent into your hearts the Spirit of his Son, the Spirit who cries out: Abba, Father.

sections.title: One Bread, One Cup
sections.author: Bobby Fisher
sections.snippet: We all come before you now, hungry for your healing touch. Hear we stand with open hearts, thirsting for your love.

sections.title: Renew
sections.author: Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Our Father, Maker of the heavens and the earth, author of the universe who imagined us, God All-Seeing: into our humanity comes; Let your kindom be with us, Oh, let your will be do

sections.title: Holy, Holy, Holy Cry
sections.author: Rick Modlin
sections.snippet: The Lamb of God stands on the height among the glorious clouds of light, above the city paved in gold where death and darkness have no hold.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
